title: olea europaea var. ferruginea
intro: Olea europaea var. ferruginea, also known as the ironwood or rusty-leaf olive, is a variety of the olive tree that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of olea europaea var. ferruginea include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting the immune system and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of olea europaea var. ferruginea include infused oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
